A. The system exhibits several issues, including ignoring other agents' suggestions (repeatedly prompting for a solution despite being told it's unsolvable), disobeying task specifications (providing simplified implementations instead of finding the actual code), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code modifications), weak verification (failing to identify critical errors), and premature termination (failing a task due to an invalid token without further investigation). There are also instances of step repetition and loss of conversation history.
